vocabulary.definition: A curated Chuck Norris fact or humorous statement returned by the API, identified by a unique ID and optionally associated with one or more categories.
A thematic classification applied to jokes (e.g., dev, science, sport). Used to filter random joke requests.
A globally unique identifier string assigned to each joke in the database.
The plain text content of a Chuck Norris joke.
A permanent URL pointing to the Chuck Norris avatar PNG image, returned with every joke.
A permalink URL for a specific joke, constructed as https://api.chucknorris.io/jokes/{id}.
The timestamp indicating when a joke was first added to the database.
The timestamp indicating when a joke was last modified in the database.
A free text search string (3-120 characters) used to search across the joke database.
An optional query parameter to replace 'Chuck Norris' with a custom name in the returned joke text.
The count of jokes returned in a search result set.
The array of joke objects contained in a search result.
